scenario: B2B IT services — LinkedIn thought-leadership post

product.name: CloudNest Managed Cloud
product.description: CloudNest helps SMBs migrate to AWS and Azure with zero-downtime deployment, 24/7 monitoring, and predictable monthly pricing. Ideal for companies outgrowing shared hosting.
product.target_audience: CTOs and IT heads at 20–200 employee companies

linkedin.body_append: Cut infra costs by up to 30% in the first quarter.
